results.engine_gap: no 'tap creature for mana' event — TAP carries no for_mana flag and MANA_ADDED has no source-tap binding
results.notes: Trigger requires distinguishing tap-for-mana from any other tap; not detectable today.
Pure activated ability: 'Sacrifice this: another target Ally gains indestructible UEOT'.

results.engine_gap: activated discard ability ({2}{W}, Discard ~: damage = creatures you control)
results.notes: Wired the attacks-alone trigger via a custom COMBAT_DECLARED interceptor (broader than make_attacks_alone_trigger which is self-only). Pumps the lone attacker by +X/+X UEOT where X is creatures you control. Verified end-to-end: solo attacker grows by count, multi-attacker triggers nothing.
Both abilities are activated ({T}: untap, Waterbend {3} {T}: tap target opp creature).

results.engine_gap: Ward-Waterbend (waterbend cost on protection check) + per-turn second-draw tracker
results.notes: Both faces of the card depend on engine features absent today.

results.engine_gap: graveyard-zone trigger + per-turn second-draw tracker + finality-counter ETB rider
results.notes: Trigger lives in the graveyard and pays optional cost to return with finality counter.

Wired the damage-amplification replacement: TRANSFORM-priority interceptor reads live fire counters from obj.state.counters and adds that to DAMAGE events from sources we control to opponents/their permanents. Verified end-to-end: 2 base damage + 3 fire counters -> 5 damage; 0 counters -> no change; correctly skips damage to own creatures.

results.engine_gap: exhaust activated ability for double-strike counter
results.notes: Wired prowess explicitly via make_spell_cast_trigger (engine has no automatic prowess handler — same pattern as kitsa_otterball_elite in bloomburrow). Emits PT_MODIFICATION +1/+1 UEOT on noncreature CAST/SPELL_CAST. Verified end-to-end: 1/3 -> 2/4 after a noncreature spell.

results.engine_gap: block restriction by attacker context (make_cant_block filter sees only blocker_id) + waterbend activated ability
results.notes: 'Can't be blocked by power 2 or less' would require a custom interceptor with attacker-context awareness (not the existing make_cant_block helper). The {5}+counter ability is pure activated.
{T}: Add {G}; with power-4+ creature, add {G}{G} instead — pure activated mana ability.

results.engine_gap: activated abilities ({T}/discard for draw and {1}{T}+sac for graveyard return)
results.notes: Both abilities are activated — no static or trigger angle.

results.engine_gap: tracked-modal 'choose one that hasn't been chosen' across turns
results.notes: Beg of first-main modal whose available modes shrink as they're picked. No mode-history tracker today.

results.engine_gap: Equipment attachment-bound granted activated ability + Equip cost
results.notes: Pure equipment that grants an activated ability to the equipped creature.

results.engine_gap: conditional ETB-tapped + mana ability + activated keyword grant
results.notes: Land's only non-mana ability is the activated firebending grant.

results.engine_gap: land-as-attacker handling + activated unblockable for two creatures sharing a type
results.notes: 'This land can't be blocked' is a no-op since lands don't attack. The other ability is purely activated.
